name: allstak/sdk-php
description: Official AllStak PHP SDK — drop-in observability for plain PHP and Laravel apps. Captures errors, logs, HTTP requests, DB queries, traces, outbound HTTP, and scheduled cron tasks with one Composer require and one API key.

suggest.illuminate/support: Required for the optional Laravel integration (auto-discovered service provider).
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: Required for outbound HTTP capture via Laravel's Http client (already installed by laravel/framework).
suggest.monolog/monolog: Required for the AllStak Monolog handler (AllStak\Monolog\AllStakHandler), Monolog 3.x — usable in any PHP app and in plain Symfony via Monolog.
suggest.symfony/http-kernel: Required for the optional Symfony bundle (AllStak\Symfony\AllStakBundle).
suggest.symfony/config: Required for the optional Symfony bundle DI configuration.
suggest.symfony/dependency-injection: Required for the optional Symfony bundle DI extension.
